Stigmergy & Indirect Coordination — Emergent Collective Behavior
episodes.anchor: Agents do not need to communicate directly to coordinate. Modifications to the environment act as signals. Complexity emerges from simple rules.
episodes.impl_insight: Sovereign Core already implements stigmergy architecturally. Naming it correctly unlocks the full theoretical toolkit. MemEvolve retrieval weight evolution IS pheromone evaporation.

episodes.title: Autopoiesis — Systems That Produce Themselves
episodes.anchor: A living system is one that continuously produces the components that make it up. Structure and process are inseparable. Cognition IS the process of living.

episodes.impl_insight: Knowledge graphs are not random. They self-organize into scale-free structure. Knowing this lets you design the Feynman graph intentionally: seed the hubs you want, let attachment do the rest.
